series.name: 3M Die-Cuttable Tape Series DC2000
series.description: Black foam tape designed for attachment of nameplates, badges and emblems to the exterior of vehicles. Designed to process easily in die-cutting operations including high-speed rotary operations. Exhibits high resistance to pluck and torque forces.
features: Excellent adhesion to paint and chrome
Firm core resists twisting forces that may result in detachment of individual letters
Excellent resistance to impact in cold weather
applications: Low demand applications whose primary attachment methods are mechanical
Spoiler applications that require tape to perform as a gasket

params.name: 离型膜选项-SC2
params.method_html: SC2 White, 2-side silicone-coated, High Density Polyethylene

params.name: 保质期与储存
params.method_html: One year from date of receipt by customer when stored at 4°C–38°C and 0–95% relative humidity (RH). Optimum storage conditions are 22°C (72°F) and 50% RH.

params.name: 拔脱测试
params.method_html: Typical results. Maintains pluck adhesion on new low surface energy and scratch- and mar-resistant paint systems in addition to conventional paint systems.

params.name: 扭矩测试
params.method_html: Typical results. Demonstrates higher resistance to twisting forces (torque) compared to typical competitive tapes.

params.name: 70度静态剪切
params.method_html: Typical results. Exceeds 100 hours at 70°C (158°F). Static shear tests are run with 25.4 mm (1.0 in.) wide by 25.4 mm (1 x 1 in.) long tape on chrome, 6.8 kg (15 lb.) roll down against enamel paint. Weight is 500 grams (1.1 lb.).

spec_values.value: One year from date of receipt by customer when stored at 4°C–38°C and 0–95% relative humidity (RH). Optimum storage conditions are 22°C (72°F) and 50% RH.
Maintains pluck adhesion on new low surface energy and scratch- and mar-resistant paint systems in addition to conventional paint systems.
Higher resistance to twisting forces (torque) compared to typical competitive tapes.
